effect.target: bold_elements (heading(s) + one key phrase/claim per paragraph + statistical callout figure)

rule_text: Bold is for hierarchy and key takeaways, not decoration. Per email section, bold at most: the heading(s), one key phrase or claim per paragraph, and the statistical callout figure.
intent: Keep bold meaningful by limiting it to true emphasis points.
summary: Use bold only for hierarchy/key takeaways: per email section, bold headings, one key phrase/claim per paragraph, and statistical callout figures only.
